headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录265篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究188篇, 开源项目35篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

▸ ChromeDevTools /chrome-devtools-mcp：Chrome DevTools for coding agents

▸ dotnet /skills：Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

▸ Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook

▸ OpenAI opens Singapore AI lab as IMDA updates AI framework：OpenAI will open its first Applied AI Lab outside the US in Singapore. The lab is part of a new part
text: 今日共收录265篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究188篇, 开源项目35篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
top_items: OpenAI opens Singapore AI lab as IMDA up
